prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FRZNHAIRCLIPS-12PC-FZ2992-AMZ Product Type: HAIR_CLIP Brand (from catalog): U.P.D., Inc. Existing Title: U.P.D., Inc. Minnie 12pk Snap Clips on Card Description: These frosted glitter-adorned Disney Frozen 2 hair clips are perfect for little Frozen 2, Elsa, Anna, and Olaf fans. With pretty Frozen 2 colors and designs, these snap clips make great hair accessories, whether to wear to school, to a birthday party, for dress up or pretend play and more.

The Frozen 2 Anna, Elsa and Olaf snap hair clips are sturdy, durable and comfortable for girls to wear during daily activities. The non slip hair clips are suitable for all hair types, including thin fine hair, curly hair, thick hair and everything in between. Several of the snap clips are feature cute, raised and rounded bubble-like graphics of Elsa, Anna and Olaf, so little Frozen 2 fans can show off their favorite Frozen characters.

Easy to use, little ones will feel oh-so grown up styling their own hair with these adorable and pretty colored Frozen-themed hair clips. And lastly, made from quality metal materials, the snap hair clips will stand up to lots of styling and provide all day hold and comfort. Search Terms: girls hair clips girls hair accessories kids hair barrettes frozen gifts frozen stocking stuffers disney hair accessories disney stocking stuffers sparkle hair clips girls fashion accessories kids fashion gifts dress up girls gifts sparkle fashion Features: - FROZEN 2 SNAP HAIR CLIPS FOR GIRLS: These frosted glitter adorned Disney Frozen 2 hair clips are perfect for little Frozen 2, Elsa, Anna and Olaf fans! With pretty Frozen 2 colors and designs, these snap clips make great hair accessories, whether to wear to school, to a birthday party, for dress up or pretend play and more! - FUN FOR EVERYDAY HAIR STYLING: The non slip hair clips are suitable for all hair types including thin fine hair, curly hair, thick hair and everything in between! These Frozen 2 hair clips are easy to use and little ones will feel oh so grown up styling their hair all on their own - ALL DAY COMFORT AND HOLD HAIR CLIPS: Designed for long lasting wear and comfort, these Frozen themed snap hair clips are made from durable metal materials and will stand up to lots of styling and all day wear! - PRETTY FROZEN 2 DESIGNS: Featuring pretty Frozen 2 designs in frosted pink, lavender and blue colors, these hair clips will brighten any bad hair day! Several of the clips include cute raised and rounded bubble graphics of Elsa, Anna and Olaf so little ones can show off their favorite Frozen characters - SPECIFICATIONS: Hair Clip Dimensions: 2 x 0.75 x 0.25 inches; Color: Multi: Materials: Metal and Plastic; Weight: 0.05lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: U.P.D., Inc. Frozen 2 12-pk Snap Hair Clips

anthropic.title_differentiation: Frosted Glitter, Elsa Anna Olaf Designs, All Hair Types, Metal And Plastic, Non-Slip, All Day Comfort

openai.title_differentiation: Frosted Glitter Designs, Elsa Anna Olaf Graphics, Non Slip Hold, All Hair Types, Durable Metal, Ages 3 And Up
